name: Bear Lake / Marina Side KOA Holiday
description: Come play pickleball at Bear Lake / Marina Side KOA Holiday in Garden City, UT! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Bear Lake / Trail Side KOA Journey
description: Come play pickleball at Bear Lake / Trail Side KOA Journey in Garden City, UT! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Garden City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Garden City Park in Garden City, UT! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Garden City Pond
description: Garden City Pond is a place to play pickleball in Garden City, UT. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
